## Summary

Brief description of what this PR adds or fixes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (existing check was wrong or causing false positive)
- [ ] New check / rule
- [ ] Token estimate addition / correction
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## New rules added (if any)

| Code | Level | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `sec:example-rule` | `security:high` | What it catches |

## Test coverage

- [ ] New tests added for each new rule
- [ ] All existing tests still pass (`pytest -v` is green)
- [ ] No false positives on a clean valid config

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is Python 3.9+ compatible
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added
- [ ] Type annotations on new functions
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if significant change)
